message:
fix(storage): external_ref uniqueness enforcement and atomic blocked cache migration

- sqlite.rs: add explicit uniqueness checks for external_ref fields in both
  INSERT (upsert) and UPDATE paths, since FrankenSQLite's backend doesn't
  reliably enforce UNIQUE constraints; checks done in application code with
  error messages including the conflicting issue ID for debugging
- sqlite.rs: remove transitive parent-child blocking propagation loop and its
  MAX_DEPTH=10000 safety bound from rebuild_blocked_cache(); the cascade
  behavior was never fully specified or tested and added unnecessary complexity
- schema.rs: wrap blocked_issues_cache table migration in a transaction
  (BEGIN IMMEDIATE / COMMIT) to prevent concurrent database opens from seeing
  a partially migrated state where the table is dropped but not yet recreated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
